glosses.vi: bìa hồ sơ; hồ sơ tác phẩm
glosses.ja: ファイル; ポートフォリオ

sentences.target: Ich habe meine Mappe im Wohnzimmer vergessen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈmapə ɪm ˈvoːnˌt͡sɪmɐ fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsn̩/

translations.de: Ich habe meine Mappe im Wohnzimmer vergessen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈmapə ɪm ˈvoːnˌt͡sɪmɐ fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsn̩/
translations.en: I left my folder in the living room.
translations.es: Dejé la carpeta en la sala.
translations.fr: J'ai oublié ma pochette dans le salon.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato la cartellina in salotto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把文件夹落在客厅了。
translations.yue: 我喺客廳遺低咗個文件夾。
translations.vi: Tôi để quên tập hồ sơ trong phòng khách.
translations.nl: Ik heb mijn map in de woonkamer laten liggen.
translations.hi: मैं फाइल लिविंग रूम में भूल गया।
translations.id: Aku ketinggalan map di ruang tamu.
translations.ja: リビングにフォルダーを置き忘れた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1sg) forming the Perfekt with the past participle 'vergessen'.
Possessive determiner; agrees with the feminine singular accusative noun 'Mappe' (marks possession).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'vergessen' (accusative).
Contracted form of 'in dem'; preposition 'in' with dative expressing location (article is neuter, dative singular).
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'in' (dative); locative complement.
Lexical verb in past participle; head of the perfect construction with 'habe'.

sentences.target: Du brauchst die Mappe morgen in der Schule.
sentences.reading: /du bʁaʊ̯xst diː ˈmapə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Du brauchst die Mappe morgen in der Schule.
translations.ipa: /du bʁaʊ̯xst diː ˈmapə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: You need the folder tomorrow at school.
translations.es: Mañana necesitas la carpeta en el colegio.
translations.fr: Tu auras besoin du dossier demain à l'école.
translations.it: Domani ti serve la cartellina a scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 你明天在学校需要这个文件夹。
translations.yue: 你聽日喺學校要用呢個文件夾。
translations.ru: Тебе завтра в школе нужна папка.
translations.pt: Você vai precisar da pasta amanhã na escola.
translations.he: אתה צריך את התיקייה מחר בבית הספר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai ở trường bạn cần tập hồ sơ.
translations.nl: Je hebt die map morgen op school nodig.
translations.uk: Тобі завтра в школі потрібна папка.
translations.hu: Holnap szükséged lesz a mappára az iskolában.
translations.hi: तुम्हें कल स्कूल में वह फाइल चाहिए।
translations.pl: Jutro w szkole będziesz potrzebować teczki.
translations.el: Αύριο στο σχολείο θα χρειαστείς τον φάκελο.
translations.nb: Du trenger mappa i morgen på skolen.
translations.id: Besok di sekolah kamu butuh map itu.
translations.sv: Du behöver mappen i morgon i skolan.
translations.ro: Mâine îți trebuie dosarul la școală.
translations.cs: Zítra ve škole budeš potřebovat složku.
translations.da: Du har brug for mappen i morgen i skolen.
translations.ja: 明日学校でそのフォルダーが必要だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 2sg); governs an accusative object.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Mappe' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (accusative).
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb with time reference.
Preposition selecting dative (static location).
Definite article, feminine singular dative; determiner within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'in' (dative); location.

sentences.target: Seine Mappe liegt auf dem Schreibtisch.

translations.de: Seine Mappe liegt auf dem Schreibtisch.
translations.en: His folder is on the desk.
translations.es: Su carpeta está sobre el escritorio.
translations.fr: Sa pochette est sur le bureau.
translations.it: La sua cartellina è sulla scrivania.
translations.yue: 佢嘅文件夾喺書枱上面。
translations.pt: A pasta dele está em cima da mesa.
translations.vi: Tập hồ sơ của anh ấy ở trên bàn.
translations.nl: Zijn map ligt op het bureau.
translations.hi: उसकी फाइल मेज़ पर रखी है।
translations.el: Ο φάκελός του είναι πάνω στο γραφείο.
translations.ja: 彼のフォルダーは机の上にある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject 'Mappe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject (nominative).
Finite main verb (present, 3sg); denotes location/state.
Preposition selecting dative (static location).
Definite article, masculine singular dative; determiner of 'Schreibtisch'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'auf' (dative); location.

sentences.target: Die Mappe ist voll mit alten Fotos.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈmapə ɪst fɔl mɪt ˈaltn̩ ˈfoːtoːs/

translations.de: Die Mappe ist voll mit alten Fotos.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈmapə ɪst fɔl mɪt ˈaltn̩ ˈfoːtoːs/
translations.en: The folder is full of old photos.
translations.es: La carpeta está llena de fotos antiguas.
translations.fr: La pochette est pleine de vieilles photos.
translations.it: La cartellina è piena di foto vecchie.
translations.zh-Hans: 文件夹里装满了旧照片。
translations.yue: 個文件夾入面裝滿舊相。
translations.pt: A pasta está cheia de fotos antigas.
translations.vi: Tập hồ sơ đầy những bức ảnh cũ.
translations.nl: De map zit vol met oude foto's.
translations.hu: A mappa tele van régi fotókkal.
translations.hi: फाइल पुरानी तस्वीरों से भरी है।
translations.el: Ο φάκελος είναι γεμάτος με παλιές φωτογραφίες.
translations.nb: Mappa er full av gamle bilder.
translations.id: Map itu penuh dengan foto-foto lama.
translations.sv: Mappen är full av gamla foton.
translations.ro: Dosarul e plin de fotografii vechi.
translations.da: Mappen er fuld af gamle fotos.
translations.ja: フォルダーには古い写真がたくさん入っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject 'Mappe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject (nominative).
Copular auxiliary (present, 3sg); links the subject to the predicate complement.
Predicate adjective; complement of 'ist'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Attributive adjective, dative plural; modifies 'Fotos'.
Common noun, neuter plural; object of 'mit' (dative).
